fields.summary: Computes the filled path produced when the current paint style is applied to the source path.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the filled path was computed successfully and written to <paramref name="dst" />; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the resulting filled path.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst);

fields.summary: Computes the filled path produced when the current paint style is applied to the source path, using the specified transform matrix.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the filled path was computed successfully and written to <paramref name="dst" />; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.matrix: The transform matrix to apply during path computation.
params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the resulting filled path.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix);

fields.summary: Computes the filled path produced when the current paint style is applied to the source path, clipped to the specified bounding rectangle.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the filled path was computed successfully and written to <paramref name="dst" />; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.cullRect: The bounding rectangle used to cull path segments outside the visible area.
params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the resulting filled path.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect);

fields.summary: Computes the filled path produced when the current paint style is applied to the source path, scaled by the specified resolution factor.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the filled path was computed successfully and written to <paramref name="dst" />; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.resScale: The resolution scale factor used to compute stroke detail; pass 1 for default quality.
params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the resulting filled path.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, float resScale);

fields.summary: Computes the filled path produced when the current paint style is applied to the source path, clipped to a bounding rectangle and using the specified transform matrix.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the filled path was computed successfully and written to <paramref name="dst" />; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.cullRect: The bounding rectangle used to cull path segments outside the visible area.
params.matrix: The transform matrix to apply during path computation.
params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the resulting filled path.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect, SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix);

fields.summary: Computes the filled path produced when the current paint style is applied to the source path, clipped to a bounding rectangle and scaled by the specified resolution factor.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the filled path was computed successfully and written to <paramref name="dst" />; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.cullRect: The bounding rectangle used to cull path segments outside the visible area.
params.resScale: The resolution scale factor used to compute stroke detail; pass 1 for default quality.
params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the resulting filled path.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect, float resScale);
